description: The Aventador SVJ is a masterpiece of extreme performance and design. Equipped with a naturally-aspirated V12 engine producing 759 HP, it features active aerodynamics (ALA) and carbon fiber construction for ultimate track and road dominance.

Inspired by Lamborghini's racing heritage, the Huracan STO is a road-homologated super sports car. Its naturally-aspirated V10 outputs 631 HP to the rear wheels, offering an authentic racetrack driving feel on every corner.

The Lamborghini Revuelto is the brand's first V12 hybrid plug-in HPEV (High Performance Electrified Vehicle). Combining a roaring 6.5L V12 with three electric motors, it delivers a staggering 1,001 HP.

Ferrari's flagship plug-in hybrid supercar, the SF90 Stradale, merges a twin-turbo V8 engine with three electric motors. The result is a lightning-fast 986 HP combined output and state-of-the-art torque vectoring.
The 812 Superfast represents the pinnacle of front-mid-engined V12 grand tourers. Unleashing 789 HP, it delivers breathtaking throttle response, incredible balance, and a majestic exhaust note.

Ferrari's first-ever four-door four-seater, the Purosangue, is powered by a naturally aspirated 6.5L V12 producing 715 HP. It redefines the luxury performance crossover with active suspension and sports car dynamics.

The Chiron Mistral is Bugatti's ultimate roadster, powered by the legendary W16 engine. Delivering 1,578 HP, it is the final open-top W16 masterpiece, offering an unmatched sensory experience of wind and speed.

Built for corners, the Bugatti Divo is a highly exclusive hypercar optimized for handling, agility, and aerodynamic downforce. Powered by the iconic W16 engine, it produces 1,479 HP and is limited to just 40 units.

The Bugatti Bolide is an experimental, track-only hyper sportscar featuring an extreme weight-to-power ratio. Its W16 engine pumps out a breath-taking 1,824 HP, mated to a featherweight carbon monocoque.

The Rolls Royce Phantom is the ultimate expression of bespoke luxury and commanding presence. Powered by a twin-turbo V12 engine, it floats on a Magic Carpet Ride suspension, offering unmatched prestige and comfort.
Embodying Rolls Royce's 'Post Opulent' design philosophy, the Ghost offers minimalist elegance paired with extreme engineering sophistication. Under the hood is a whisper-quiet 6.75L twin-turbo V12.

The Cullinan Black Badge is the supreme luxury SUV. Combining off-road capabilities with unmatched Rolls Royce comfort, it delivers 592 HP from its enhanced twin-turbo V12 and has a dark, aggressive aesthetic.

The Mercedes-AMG G63 is an icon of rugged luxury and raw horsepower. Powered by a hand-built 4.0L twin-turbo V8 producing 577 HP, it features three locking differentials and an unmistakable exhaust rumble.

The ultimate track-focused Mercedes, the AMG GT Black Series features a flat-plane crankshaft V8 pushing 720 HP. Its aggressive aero, adjustable wing, and carbon body panels are designed for lap records.

The Mercedes-Maybach S680 represents the absolute peak of first-class automotive travel. Featuring a twin-turbo V12 engine and an ultra-exclusive dual-tone cabin, it offers executive massage seats and champagne flutes.
The BMW M8 Competition Coupe merges supercar speed with luxurious daily usability. Featuring a twin-turbo 4.4L V8 throwing 617 HP, it accelerates from 0-60 in just 3.0 seconds via xDrive AWD.

An architectural marvel on wheels, the BMW i8 Roadster features dihedral butterfly doors and a carbon fiber reinforced passenger cell. Its hybrid drivetrain delivers efficient yet spirited open-top cruising.

The most powerful BMW M road vehicle ever, the XM Label Red combines a twin-turbo V8 with an electric motor to unleash 738 HP. Featuring bold styling accents, it stands as M Division's ultimate flagship SUV.

The legendary Audi R8 V10 Performance marks the end of an era. Its naturally aspirated 5.2L V10 outputs a screaming 602 HP, delivered to the pavement via Quattro AWD, offering pure mechanical engagement.
The Audi RS7 Sportback is a wide-body grand tourer disguised as a five-door sedan. Its twin-turbo 4.0L V8 produces 591 HP, providing blistering acceleration combined with daily refinement.
The RS e-tron GT represents Audi's future vision of performance. Built on an 800V architecture, its dual electric motors output 637 HP, pushing it to 60 mph in 3.1 seconds in absolute silence.
The Porsche 911 Turbo S is the benchmark for all-weather supercars. A twin-turbo flat-six engines throws out 640 HP, launching it from 0-60 in a physics-defying 2.6 seconds with ultimate precision.
The Porsche Taycan Turbo sets the standard for electric driving dynamics. Harnessing 670 HP, it boasts a low center of gravity and razor-sharp steering typical of a Stuttgart pedigree.
The McLaren 720S Spider delivers convertible thrills with zero compromise. Built around a carbon fibre Monocage II-S, its twin-turbo 4.0L V8 pumps out 710 HP, making it incredibly fast and agile.
The legendary McLaren P1 is a holy trinity hypercar. Featuring a 3.8-litre twin-turbo V8 engine and a high-performance electric motor, it produces 903 HP, featuring active aero and F1-derived DRS.
The Artura is McLaren's next-generation high-performance hybrid supercar. Powered by a brand-new twin-turbo V6 engine and an E-motor, it delivers 671 HP with an ultra-light carbon chassis structure.
The Tesla Model S Plaid features a tri-motor AWD platform pushing 1,020 HP. It accelerates from 0-60 mph in a staggering 1.99 seconds, while still providing over 350 miles of luxury electric range.
The Tesla Cybertruck is built from ultra-hard stainless steel exoskeleton. Its dual-motor setup unleashes 600 HP, delivering sports car acceleration in a heavy-duty electric utility truck.
The Range Rover Autobiography represents the pinnacle of British refined luxury. Delivering 523 HP from its twin-turbo V8, it offers 24-way heated massage executive seats and off-road refinement.
The Defender 130 fits 8 passengers across three rows of luxury seating. Outfitted with an inline-six engine pushing 395 HP, it combines massive towing capabilities with absolute trail competence.

Bentley's performance-focused grand tourer, the Continental GT, houses a twin-turbo V8 pushing 542 HP. Handcrafted leather, active all-wheel steering, and unparalleled refinement define this masterpiece.

The Bentley Flying Spur is the ultimate luxury performance sedan. The V8 engine delivers 542 HP, pushing the car to 60 mph in 4.0 seconds while coddling passengers in a world of hand-stitched veneers.

Described as the world's first 'Super Tourer', the Aston Martin DB12 is powered by a twin-turbo V8 pumping 671 HP. It has a beautiful redesigned interior, electronic rear differential, and class-leading poise.
The DBS represents a celebration of Aston Martin's twin-turbo V12 engine. Harnessing 715 HP, it features unique styling cues and track-calibrated dynamics.
Maserati's MC20 showcases a carbon fibre monocoque and a futuristic aerodynamic body. Powered by the Nettuno twin-turbo V6 putting out 621 HP, it sounds and drives exceptionally.
The Lexus LX600 model is a premier flagship SUV with a twin-turbo V6 engine pushing 409 HP. It features four-seat configuration with reclining VIP massage chairs and active height control.
Highly sought-after worldwide, the Land Cruiser 300 edition is engineered for legendary reliability. Featuring a high-torque 3.3L twin-turbo diesel producing 304 HP and electronic diff locks.
Known affectionately as Godzilla, the GT-R features extensive carbon fiber aerodynamic components. Its twin-turbo 3.8L V6 is handcrafted by Takumi engineers, pushing 565 HP to all four wheels.
The Corvette C8 features a mid-engine layout with a naturally aspirated 6.2L V8 producing 495 HP. It sets a new benchmark for accessible performance cars worldwide.
The Challenger Hellcat is an absolute muscle car icon. Equipped with a supercharged 6.2L HEMI V8 generating 717 HP, it offers brutal straight-line speed and iconic styling.
An F1 car for the road, the Aston Martin Valkyrie combines a high-revving 6.5L Cosworth V12 with a Rimac-designed hybrid electric system. It generates massive downforce and a raw F1 engine scream.
The Koenigsegg Jesko is an ultra-exclusive hypercar featuring a twin-turbo V8 engine and a revolutionary 9-speed Light Speed Transmission. Optimized for maximum downforce on racetracks.
Pagani's masterpiece of carbon-titanium artistry, the Huayra, combines lightweight sculpture with AMG-built twin-turbo V12 power throwing out 791 HP.
The Ford GT Heritage Edition pays homage to the legendary Le Mans-winning GT40. Powered by a carbon-fiber structure and a twin-turbo 3.5L EcoBoost V6 generating 660 HP.
The Lexus LFA is legendary for its 4.8L naturally aspirated V10 engine, developed with Yamaha to rev so fast it required a digital tachometer. The engine note is akin to an F1 car.
A gorgeous luxury coupe, the F-Type R features Jaguar's signature supercharged 5.0L V8 pushing 575 HP. A ferocious roar, active exhaust system, and stunning proportional lines.
The GranTurismo is a sublime long-distance GT car. Fitted with the innovative twin-turbo Nettuno V6 producing 542 HP, it offers comfort for four and classic Italian flair.
The Escalade-V is a supercharged luxury behemoth. Featuring a hand-built 6.2L V8 putting out 682 HP, it features magnetorheological damping and a high-end AKG audio system.
The Bentayga provides extra luxury and rear legroom. Its 4.0L twin-turbo V8 makes 542 HP, gliding over bumps with active anti-roll control.
The Lucid Air Sapphire is a tri-motor luxury sedan pushing a staggering 1234 HP. It hits 0-60 in just 1.89 seconds, offering carbon-ceramic brakes and high-end track tuning.
The Rimac Nevera is a ground-breaking all-electric hypercar. Four independent electric motors output a mind-numbing 1914 HP, rewriting acceleration records globally.
The Mercedes-AMG ONE brings Formula 1 hybrid technology directly from the track to the street. With a highly advanced 1.6-litre V6 hybrid drivetrain, it pushes 1063 HP.
